mapper.select: SELECT session_id, user_id, user_name, title, is_bookmarked, last_message_time, create_time FROM ai_chat_session WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY last_message_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_chat_session (user_id, user_name, title, is_bookmarked, last_message_time, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userName}, #{title}, #{isBookmarked}, #{lastMessageTime}, #{createTime})
